summary: Complete testing of Customer Profile Address Management and Producer Profile features. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Customer Profile - Address Tab: Display list of saved addresses
Customer Profile - Address Tab: Add new address form with all fields
Customer Profile - Address Tab: Edit existing address
Customer Profile - Address Tab: Delete address
Customer Profile - Address Tab: Set address as default
Customer Profile - Address validation requires mandatory fields
Customer Address endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Producer Profile Page: Display company info (read-only)
Producer Profile Page: Company Info tab with company details
Producer Profile Page: Office address form
Producer Profile Page: Warehouse address form
Producer Profile Page: Save addresses endpoint PUT /api/producer/addresses
Producer Profile role check - customer cannot access producer endpoints
Navigation: Producer sidebar shows Profile link
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly set for testing in CustomerProfile.js and ProducerProfile.js
Customer address CRUD operations work correctly with proper validation
Producer profile displays company info as read-only (correct behavior)
Producer can update office and warehouse addresses independently
Both pages have proper tab navigation (Profile, Password, Dietary Preferences, Addresses for customer; Company Info, Addresses for producer)
seed_data_creation: Test addresses created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Profile Address Management and Producer Profile features fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/customer/addresses and PUT /api/producer/addresses work correctly. Frontend pages: CustomerProfile.js has Addresses tab with full CRUD for multiple addresses. ProducerProfile.js has Company Info (read-only) and Addresses tabs with office/warehouse address forms. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.

customer_address_management.details: Full CRUD operations for customer addresses. Add, edit, delete, set default all working. Address list displays correctly with action buttons.

producer_profile.details: Company Info tab shows read-only company details. Addresses tab allows editing office and warehouse addresses. Save functionality working.

navigation.details: Producer sidebar includes Profile nav item. Customer profile has Addresses tab accessible.

backend_apis.details: All endpoints tested: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/customer/addresses, PUT /api/customer/addresses/{id}/default, GET /api/producer/profile, PUT /api/producer/addresses
